overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a misty temperate forest. The character traverses a narrow dirt path, crosses a wooden log barricade, and continues through a cleared area with tree stumps and scattered logs under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with tall pines

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a narrow dirt path through dense forest, two swords visible on his back, moving toward a distant mountain

entered.detail: Dense cluster of tall evergreen pine trees lining the left side of the path
Dense cluster of tall evergreen pine trees lining the right side of the path
Narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with patches of grass
Distant mountain peaks visible through the mist and trees
Green ferns and grass growing alongside the path
Green ferns and grass growing alongside the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense pine forest. The path is flanked by ferns and tall evergreen trees, with misty mountains visible in the distance. The overcast sky creates a cool, diffused light throughout the woodland.

events.description: approaching and climbing over a large wooden log barricade blocking the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing over a wooden log barricade, stepping carefully over the stacked horizontal logs

entered.detail: Large stacked horizontal logs forming a defensive wall or barrier
Large stacked horizontal logs forming a defensive wall or barrier
Tall vertical wooden posts with pointed tops, some broken or leaning
Vertical wooden fence structure connected to the log barricade

segments.scene_description: The forest opens slightly as Geralt approaches a substantial wooden fortification made of stacked logs and vertical posts. He climbs over the barricade, transitioning from the dense forest into a more open area beyond the wooden wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: cleared forest field with tree stumps

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through a cleared area with tree stumps and scattered rocks, heading toward the distant tree line

entered.detail: Field of cut tree stumps and logs scattered across the ground
Field of cut tree stumps and logs scattered across the ground
Small rocks and stones littering the dirt path
Tree line marking the edge of the cleared area in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the barricade, Geralt walks through a wide-open clearing filled with tree stumps and scattered logs. The dense forest gives way to this harvested area, with a distant tree line visible under the overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense pine forest as a character traverses a narrow dirt trail. It begins with the camera trailing Geralt along a path flanked by lush ferns and towering evergreen trees. As he moves forward, the cool, diffused light of an overcast sky illuminates the woodland, revealing misty mountains looming in the far distance. The scene maintains this atmospheric depth, steadily pushing deeper into the temperate wilderness.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a dense forest transitions into a wide, harvested clearing. It begins with Geralt approaching a substantial wooden fortification of stacked logs and vertical posts that blocks the path. As he climbs over the barricade, the camera follows his movement from the enclosed woodland into a more open space beyond the wall. The scene then expands into a broad clearing filled with tree stumps and scattered logs, where the dense canopy gives way to a distant tree line under an overcast sky.
